shots.reasoning_brief: Visual-only establishing shot of apartment; no characters or dialogue present.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我不知道你是谁的。但你是我的。

shots.reasoning_brief: Offscreen narration by Shen Niange; visible character is Shen Niange in close-up on abdomen; no props or music.

narration_lines: 没有家属签字，没有陪产。产房里只有她一个人。
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual description of Shen Niange leaving hospital; narration line explicit in excerpt; no dialogue.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 予予……妈妈给你取的名字，知予。知道的知，给予的予。妈妈知道的一切，都想给你。

shots.reasoning_brief: Shen Niange speaking softly to infant Shen Zhiyu; visible both in close-up; listener is child.
Shen Niange responding to nurse without turning; listener is nurse from context.
Continuation of dialogue with nurse; Shen Niange stops and speaks calmly.
Montage shots: Shen Niange with young Shen Zhiyu in various settings; visual-only, no dialogue.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 祝你生日快乐……祝你生日快乐……

shots.reasoning_brief: Shen Niange singing to Shen Zhiyu on birthday; listener is child.
Shen Niange laughing, stopping child from touching candle; action on child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，那个房子好大！我们以后能住那么大的房子吗？

shots.reasoning_brief: Shen Zhiyu speaking milkily to Shen Niange on bus; listener is mother.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我爸爸……在很远的地方。但我觉得他会来找我。

music_cues: 钢琴渐起，温柔中带着心酸
shots.reasoning_brief: Shen Zhiyu in kindergarten interview responding to teacher; music cue from context; listener teacher.
Visual of Shen Zhiyu drawing, Shen Niange checking phone; prop smartphone noted but no handoff.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 滨海市？就是那个有大高楼的城市？

shots.reasoning_brief: Shen Zhiyu responding to mother, stopping drawing; listener mother.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，滨海市……是不是我爸爸在的地方？

shots.reasoning_brief: Shen Zhiyu asking seriously about father; listener mother.
Shen Zhiyu continuing drawing, affirming intuition; listener mother.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 四年了。我以为这辈子都不会再回到那个城市。可是予予需要最好的医生。而最好的医生……在滨海市。

shots.reasoning_brief: Offscreen narration by Shen Niange; visible her closing eyes.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪你看！这是我们一家三口！中间这个黑色的是爸爸，因为我还没见过他！等见到了我就涂成肉色！

music_cues: 弦乐轻起，从心酸转为温柔，但暗流涌动
shots.reasoning_brief: Shen Zhiyu showing drawing to mother; listener mother; music cue from context.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 好。等找到了，你涂成最漂亮的颜色。

shots.reasoning_brief: Shen Niange hugging child in response; listener and action target child.
